name: Product Imagery & Media
description: How product images and media should help users understand and evaluate the product

heuristics.principle: Images should clearly communicate the product's real-world size and proportions
checkpoints: Size reference is provided (human model, hand, or common object)
Dimensions or scale indicators are present where relevant
Image aspect ratios do not distort the product

heuristics.principle: Contextual imagery should show the product in use or on a human model where relevant
checkpoints: Lifestyle or in-context images are included where appropriate
For wearables, product is shown on a model or mannequin
For home goods, product is shown in a room setting
Usage context helps user understand practical application

heuristics.principle: Multiple image angles should be available, with zoom or high-resolution viewing
checkpoints: More than one product image is available
Different angles or views are provided
Zoom functionality or high-resolution viewing is available

heuristics.principle: Media should load quickly and not block access to key purchasing actions
checkpoints: Images load progressively or with placeholders
Add to Cart button is accessible before all images load
Video content does not autoplay and block the page
Media loading does not cause layout shifts
